mapper.sql:
SELECT CASE X.WKSTATUS_A WHEN 0 THEN '작업생성' WHEN 50 THEN '입고중/부분입고' WHEN 90 THEN '입고완료' WHEN 91 THEN '입고마감' WHEN 99 THEN '작업취소' END WKSTATUS , X.*, (SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = X.INSERTURKEY) AS INSERTURKEY_NAME, (SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = X.UPDATEURKEY) AS UPDATEURKEY_NAME FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(B.WKSTATUS) = 0 THEN 0 WHEN AVG(B.WKSTATUS) > 0 AND AVG(B.WKSTATUS) < 90 THEN 50 WHEN AVG(B.WKSTATUS) = 90 THEN 90 WHEN AVG(B.WKSTATUS) = 91 THEN 91 WHEN AVG(B.WKSTATUS) = 99 THEN 99 END WKSTATUS_A , A.CTKEY, A.IBHDTYPE , A.OWKEY , A.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.IBEXPECTDATE , (SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME, MAX(A.INSERTDATE) AS INSERTDATE, MAX(A.INSERTURKEY) INSERTURKEY,MAX(A.UPDATEDATE) AS UPDATEDATE, MAX(A.UPDATEURKEY) UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD A , TWORK_INFO_IB_DT B WHERE A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY AND B.WKSTATUS != '99' AND B.ATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND A.IBHDTYPE IN ('10', '50') GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.IBHDTYPE , A.OWKEY , A.EXTERNORDERKEY, A.IBEXPECTDATE) X WHERE CTKEY = '100'
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT (SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'IB_WKSTATUS' AND LAKEY = 'KOR' AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND CTCD_DTKEY = A.WKSTATUS) AS WKSTATUS_KOR , AAA.WKSTATUS_A , A.WKSTATUS , B.IBHDTYPE , A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY ,B.EXTERNORDERKEY , A.EXTERNORDERLINENUM , TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(C.SN, 1)) AS SN , A.ICKEY , D.ICNAME , A.EXQTY , TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(C.CFQTY, 0)) CFQTY , A.LOGGRPCD , D.SPEC , D.UOM , C.IBCONFIRMDATE , F.PRODUCTLOT , F.PRODUCTDATE , F.EXPIREDATE , B.IBEXPECTDATE, F.NET_WGT, (SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = B.OWKEY) AS OWNAME , D.WGT_CF_YN, C.TO_IVATKEY, C.INSERTDATE , (SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = C.INSERTURKEY) AS INSERTURKEY_NAME , C.UPDATEDATE , (SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = C.UPDATEURKEY) AS UPDATEURKEY_NAME , (SELECT CTCD_DTNAME FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'LOGGRPCD' AND CTKEY = '100' AND LAKEY = 'KOR' AND CTCD_DTKEY = A.LOGGRPCD) AS LOGGRPCD_KOR FROM (SELECT AA.* FROM (SELECT CASE WHEN AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) = 0 THEN 0 WHEN AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) > 0 AND AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) < 90 THEN 50 WHEN AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) >= 90 AND AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) < 91 THEN 90 WHEN AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) >= 91 AND AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) < 99 THEN 91 WHEN AVG(BB.WKSTATUS) = 99 THEN 99 END WKSTATUS_A , BA.CTKEY, BA.OWKEY , BA.EXTERNORDERKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD BA , TWORK_INFO_IB_DT BB WHERE BA.IBHDKEY = BB.IBHDKEY and BB.WKSTATUS != '99' GROUP BY BA.CTKEY, BA.IBHDTYPE , BA.OWKEY , BA.EXTERNORDERKEY, BA.IBEXPECTDATE ) AA ) AAA INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A ON AAA.CTKEY = A.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_HD B ON AAA.EXTERNORDERKEY = B.EXTERNORDERKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = B.IBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY = C.EXTERNORDERKEY AND A.EXTERNORDERLINENUM = C.EXTERNORDERLINENUM LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT F ON A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND C.TO_IVATKEY = F.IVATKEY WHERE A.WKSTATUS != '99' AND A.ATTRIBUTE2 = '1' AND B.IBHDTYPE IN ('10', '50')
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.IBHDKEY ,A.IBDTKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.ICKEY ,A.SBKEY ,A.ICUTKEY ,A.UOM ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| A.UOM AS UOM_DESC ,'EA' AS UOM_EA ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' ||';'|| 'EA' AS UOM_EA_DESC ,A.INITQTY AS INITQTY ,A.EXQTY AS ORQTY ,(A.EXQTY - A.CFQTY) AS OR_PART_QTY ,A.EXQTY AS EXQTY ,A.CFQTY AS CFQTY ,COALESCE( ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_ILBHS IL ,TWORK_INFO_IBSN_SCAN SC WHERE IL.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND IL.IBHDKEY = A.IBHDKEY AND IL.IBDTKEY = A.IBDTKEY AND IL.ILBHSKEY = A.ILBHSKEY AND IL.DEL_YN = 'N' AND IL.ULCKEY = SC.ULCKEY AND IL.CRTYPE = '2' ),A.CFQTY )AS IBQTY ,COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(CFQTY) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT CF WHERE CF.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND CF.EXTERNORDERKEY = A.EXTERNORDERKEY AND CF.EXTERNORDERLINENUM = A.EXTERNORDERLINENUM ), 0 ) AS TASK_QTY ,A.RJQTY ,G.ICUTKEY AS ICUTKEY_EA ,A.INITQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS INITQTY_EA ,A.EXQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS EXQTY_EA ,A.CFQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS CFQTY_EA ,A.CFQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS IBQTY_EA ,A.RJQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS RJQTY_EA ,A.TO_ULCKEY ,A.COSTPRICE ,A.WKSTATUS ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'IB_WKSTATUS' ||';'|| A.WKSTATUS AS WKSTATUS_DESC ,'' AS PRODUCTDATE , CASE WHEN A.WKSTATUS = '00' THEN A.EXPIREDATE ELSE '' END AS EXPIREDATE ,A.ATTRIBUTE1 ,A.ATTRIBUTE2 ,A.ATTRIBUTE3 ,A.ATTRIBUTE4 ,A.ATTRIBUTE5 ,A.ATTRIBUTE6 ,A.ATTRIBUTE7 ,A.ATTRIBUTE8 ,A.ATTRIBUTE9 ,'' AS PRODUCTLOT ,'' AS NET_WGT_IN ,A.UDF1 ,A.UDF2 ,A.UDF3 ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,(SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = A.UPDATEURKEY) AS UPDATEURKEY_NAME ,(SELECT URNM FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE URKEY = A.INSERTURKEY) AS INSERTURKEY_NAME ,A.ORHDKEY ,A.ORDTKEY ,C.ICUTQTY ,D.ICNAME ,E.IBHDTYPE ,A.TO_LCKEY||'_'|| (SELECT ZNKEY FROM TWORK_MST_LC LC, TWORK_MST_AR AR WHERE LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY AND AR.ARKEY LIKE 'OTHER_I%' AND LC.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND AR.LOGGRPCD = CASE WHEN A.LOGGRPCD = '4' THEN '3' ELSE A.LOGGRPCD END GROUP BY ZNKEY) AS TO_LCKEY ,A.EXTERNORDERKEY ,A.EXTERNORDERLINENUM ,A.IMGHDKEY ,A.IBNRCD ,A.UDF5 ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'PM012' ||';'|| A.IBNRCD AS IBNRCD_DESC ,A.PONRCD ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'PONRCD' ||';'|| A.PONRCD AS PONRCD_DESC ,D.SPEC ,A.CTKEY || ';' || '23' ||';'|| A.GAPREASONCD AS GAPREASONCD_DESC ,D.SHELFLIFE ,D.SHELFLIFEINDICATOR ,D.SHELFLIFECODETYPE ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'SHELFLIFECODETYPE' ||';'|| D.SHELFLIFECODETYPE AS SHELFLIFECODETYPE_DESC ,F.RIBCONFIRMDATE ,F.REXPIREDATE ,SUBSTR(COALESCE(H.LCKEY, '9999999'),1,2) || SUBSTR(COALESCE(H.LCKEY, '9999999'),5) AS PICK_LCKEY ,A.CHITID ,A.CTKEY || ';' || '70' || ';' || A.CHITID AS CHITID_DESC ,I.ACKEY ,I.ACNAME ,CASE WHEN A.EXQTY > 0 THEN A.EXQTY * (#{overpercent} / 100) ELSE 1 * (#{overpercent} / 100) END AS MAXCFQTY ,D.BOTTLEPRICE AS BOTTLEPRICE ,A.BO_QTY ,A.LOGGRPCD ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'LOGGRPCD' ||';'|| A.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC ,A.ICGRKEY , CASE WHEN A.WKSTATUS != '00' THEN A.WGT ELSE A.INITQTY * D.WEIGHT END AS WGT ,A.ITEMRSNTYPE ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'RETURNREASON' ||';'|| A.ITEMRSNTYPE AS ITEMRSNTYPE_DESC ,A.ITEMRSNMSG ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'RETURNREASONTYPE' ||';'|| A.ITEMRSNMSG AS ITEMRSNMSG_DESC ,'' AS IBCONFIRMDATE ,A.ILBHSKEY ,D.WGT_CF_YN ,(SELECT OW.OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_HD E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.IBHDKEY = E.IBHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.ICUTKEY = C.ICUTKEY AND A.UOM = C.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON A.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.ICUTKEY = G.ICUTKEY AND 'EA' = G.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY ,A.IBCONFIRMDATE AS RIBCONFIRMDATE ,CASE WHEN A.SHELFLIFECODETYPE = 'PRODUCTDATE_NOTUSE' THEN MAX(B.PRODUCTDATE) ELSE MAX(B.EXPIREDATE) END AS REXPIREDATE FROM ( SELECT A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY ,'E' SHELFLIFECODETYPE ,MAX (B.IBCONFIRMDATE) AS IBCONFIRMDATE FROM TWORK_MST_IC A ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY, A.SHELFLIFECODETYPE ) A ,TWORK_INFO_IVAT B WHERE A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.IBCONFIRMDATE = B.IBCONFIRMDATE GROUP BY A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.ICKEY, A.SHELFLIFECODETYPE, A.IBCONFIRMDATE ) F ON D.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND D.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND D.ICKEY = F.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_AC I ON A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND A.ACKEY = I.ACKEY AND A.OWKEY = I.OWKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.EXTERNORDERKEY = #{externorderkey}
AND A.LOGGRPCD = #{loggrpcd}
mapper.select: SELECT CTKEY ,IBHDKEY ,IBHDTYPE ,IBHDDATE ,OWKEY ,LOGGRPCD ,ACKEY ,ACNAME ,IBCONFIRMDATE ,IBCLOSINGDATE ,WKSTATUS ,COMMENTS1 ,COMMENTS2 ,ORHDKEY ,PACKAGEORDERKEY ,ITIV_HDKEY ,EXTERNORDERKEY ,EXTERNORDERKEY2 ,UDF1 ,UDF2 ,UDF3 ,POHDKEY ,TEMPERATURE ,PLQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}

SELECT COALESCE(ACKEY, 'NONE') AS ACKEY ,COALESCE(ACNAME, 'DESCRIPTION IS NONE') AS ACNAME ,SUM(CASE WHEN WKSTATUS = '00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WKSTATUS_CREATE ,SUM(CASE WHEN WKSTATUS = '50' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WKSTATUS_WORKING ,SUM(CASE WHEN WKSTATUS = '90' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WKSTATUS_CONFIRM FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IBHDDATE BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{sysdate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - #{ENABLEMAXBETWEENDAYS}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{sysdate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + #{ENABLEMAXBETWEENDAYS}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND ACKEY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ACKEY , ACNAME
#{MOBILE_MULTI_SORING}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TWORK_INFO_ILBHS A ,TWORK_INFO_IBSN_SCAN B WHERE A.ULCKEY = B.ULCKEY AND A.ILBHSKEY = #{ilbhskey}
